violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the door tracks and gaskets of the refrigeration equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned at a frequency to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Establishment is lacking an allergen statement for consumer view. Establishment is to post an allergen statement at point of ordering and on menu board for consumer view. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the door tracks and gaskets of the refrigeration equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned at a frequency to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The ice machine was observed draining into the sanitizing basin of the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage or other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was over 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Establishment needs to adjust the amount of sanatizer being used to sanitize in the 3 bay sink. Establishment was also lacking test trips to test the sanatizer. Establishment shall purchase test strips for quaternary sanatizer. 3 bay sink procedure poster was provided at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
